title: Type resolution error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE alignments_3 (virtual_offset INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, qname TEXT NOT NULL, flag INTEGER NOT NULL, rname TEXT NOT NULL, pos INTEGER NOT NULL, epos INTEGER NOT NULL, mapq INTEGER NOT NULL, cigar TEXT NOT NULL, rnext TEXT NOT NULL, pnext INTEGER NOT NULL, tlen INTEGER NOT NULL, seq TEXT NOT NULL, qual TEXT NOT NULL);

INSERT INTO alignments_3 (virtual_offset, qname, flag, rname, pos, epos, mapq, cigar, rnext, pnext, tlen, seq, qual) VALUES (1, 'query1', 0, 'ref1', 100, 200, 60, '4M', 'ref2', 150, 50, 'ACTG', 'IIII');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alignments_3 WHERE mapq IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Setting table to read-only before dropping it
